title: Trump Voting Changes Struck Down Over Lack of Fraud Evidence
title_cn: 特朗普投票变更因缺乏欺诈证据而被否决
summary: President Donald Trump’s executive order requiring major changes to the way Americans vote suffered another courtroom defeat, this time in a suit brought by Democratic state attorneys general who disputed the government’s claims of widespread voter fraud.

summary: Two leading artificial intelligence researchers at Alphabet Inc.’s Google are planning to leave for rival Anthropic PBC, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a series of high-profile departures that risk undercutting the search giant’s position in AI.Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel, both viewed internally as key contributors to Google’s Gemini AI model, are set to move to the Claude maker, said the people, who spoke on condition of anonymity as the information is not public.

title_cn: 技术颠覆者：SentinelOne 首席执行官谈安全变革、人工智能代理
summary: The cybersecurity industry is facing unprecedented challenges as AI models become more capable. On this episode of Tech Disruptors, SentinelOne co-founder and CEO Tomer Weingarten talks about deploying security for AI agents and the evolution of the security operations center (SOC) with LLMs. He joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Mandeep Singh to discuss the impact of Anthropic Mythos, M&A in cybersecurity and the changing nature of attacks as tools become more sophisticated.

summary: A drop in chipmakers ahead of Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings weighed on stocks, with the results expected to provide clues on whether this year’s artificial-intelligence rally will be justified.

title_cn: 美联储表示基差贸易是对冲基金国债风险敞口的主要驱动力
summary: Hedge funds’ growing exposure to Treasuries is primarily due to the revival of the cash-futures basis trade, according to the Federal Reserve.

summary: The rebound in blank-check companies is proving to be a useful route to public markets for companies involved in the artificial intelligence-data center build-out, said Betsy Cohen, a veteran of SPAC dealmaking.

title: Mamdani Is In 'Control' Of The Democratic Party Says Rep. Lawler
title_cn: 众议员劳勒称马姆达尼“控制”民主党
summary: Three candidates endorsed by Zohran Mamdani swept to victory in Democratic congressional primaries on Tuesday, showing that the coalition which powered the New York City mayor to a surprising victory last year is gaining strength. Rep. Mike Lawler from New York joined Balance of Power to discuss as well as Trump canceling the signing of the housing bill.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Breaks $60,000 Again as Crypto’s Biggest Buyers Wobble
title_cn: 随着加密货币最大买家的摇摆，比特币再次突破 60,000 美元
summary: Bitcoin’s slide back below $60,000 is reviving a fear that has largely been absent from crypto for the past two years: what happens when the market’s biggest buyer comes under pressure just as retail traders lose interest.

title: Stock Indexes Give Back Gains as Chip-Stock Dip Buying  Fades
title_cn: 随着芯片股下跌买盘消退，股指回吐涨幅
summary: US stocks gave back their gains as dip-buying in chipmakers and other tech shares stalled, despite speculation that lower oil prices and a weaker housing market may ease pressure on the Federal Reserve to hike interest rates.

title: Ex-Tricolor COO to Plead Guilty to Fraud in Firm’s Collapse
title_cn: 前三色旗首席运营官承认公司倒闭中的欺诈罪
summary: Former Tricolor Holdings Chief Operating Officer David Goodgame told a judge that he will plead guilty to fraud charges stemming from the used-car dealer and lender’s collapse last year.

title_cn: 随着市场对人工智能的关注，美光的盈利呈现出新的吸引力
summary: Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings report on Wednesday afternoon is shaping up to be one of the most important in months as investors find themselves suddenly on edge over the sustainability of the AI rally.

title: ECB’s Zigman Says Price Stability Is Key, Cheaper Oil Will Help
title_cn: 欧洲央行齐格曼表示价格稳定是关键，油价下跌将有所帮助
summary: The top priority for the European Central Bank is keeping inflation in check, a task that’s becoming a little easier as oil prices retreat, according to Governing Council member Ante Zigman.

title: SpaceX Holder Andreessen Says Starship Opens Path to AI in Space
title_cn: SpaceX 持有者安德森表示，星际飞船开辟了太空人工智能之路
summary: Andreessen Horowitz LLC General Partner David George, an investor in SpaceX, said the “rapid reusability” of the new Starship rocket will be crucial to delivering on Elon Musk’s bet on orbital data centers to expand AI computing capacity.

title: Oil Erases Most Wartime Gains as More Ships Cross Hormuz
title_cn: 随着越来越多的船只穿越霍尔木兹海峡，石油抹去了大部分战时收益
summary: Oil’s wartime price gains have mostly evaporated as the US and Iran log progress in peace talks, with more tankers openly transiting the Strait of Hormuz, helping to ease fears of a supply crunch.

title: Fed’s Bowman Finalizes Moves to Reshape Bank-Supervision Unit
title_cn: 美联储鲍曼敲定重塑银行监管部门的举措
summary: Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision Michelle Bowman has completed a shakeup of the agency’s bank-oversight unit as she aims to prioritize what she sees as core financial risks.

title: Hormuz Reopening Is Quickly Flooding Oil Markets With Supply
title_cn: 霍尔木兹油田的重新开放使石油市场供应迅速涌入
summary: Key parts of the oil market are suddenly awash in supply, as a stream of cargoes out of the Strait of Hormuz accelerates after the US-Iran agreement to open the waterway.

title: Bank of Canada Rejects Recession Label for Economy’s Weakness
title_cn: 加拿大央行拒绝因经济疲软而贴上衰退标签
summary: Bank of Canada officials rejected the notion that the country’s economy is in recession as they set borrowing costs earlier this month, though they acknowledged weak growth and labor market slack.

title: Remembering the Debasement Trade
title_cn: 记住贬值贸易
summary: Let’s get a temperature check.

title: Gold Breaks Below $4,000 as Multi-Year Rally Grinds to a Halt
title_cn: 多年涨势陷入停滞，金价跌破 4,000 美元
summary: Gold fell below $4,000 an ounce for the first time since November, as the prospect of higher interest rates and a resurgent dollar bring bullion’s three-year bull market to a halt.

title: Stonepeak Raises $2.5 Billion in Private Bonds Tied to LNG Plant
title_cn: Stonepeak 筹集 25 亿美元与液化天然气工厂相关的私人债券
summary: Stonepeak has sold roughly $2.5 billion of private bonds to refinance a loan related to its investment in a liquefied natural gas export terminal in Louisiana.

title: Subzero Natural Gas Prices Show Need for Energy Permit Reform, Shale CEO Says
title_cn: 页岩气首席执行官表示，低于零度的天然气价格表明需要进行能源许可改革
summary: A record string of negative natural gas prices in the biggest US shale field shows that the US needs to streamline permitting for pipelines and other energy infrastructure, according to the boss of oil and gas producer Ovintiv Inc.

title: ESPN's Linda Cohn Reflects on Historic SportsCenter Run
title_cn: ESPN 的琳达·科恩 (Linda Cohn) 回顾历史性的体育中心跑步活动
summary:
ESPN legend and sports broadcasting trailblazer Linda Cohn is stepping away from the anchor desk following a historic career that spanned more than 30 years.

Cohn joins Bloomberg Intelligence Radio to reflect on the journey that made her the longest-tenured SportsCenter anchor in the network's history. From anchoring thousands of shows to covering unforgettable moments in sports, Cohn discusses the passion that fueled her career, her favorite memories over the years, and why helping inspire the next generation of women in broadcasting means so much to her. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gasoline Price Spike Adds to War’s Economic Toll for Russians
title_cn: 汽油价格飙升加剧了俄罗斯战争的经济损失
summary: Fuel prices in Russia jumped again, bolstering the case for central bank policy caution after Governor Elvira Nabiullina warned that lower output in the wake of Ukrainian strikes on refineries had become a new inflation risk.

title: Bitcoin’s Retreating Retail Army Exposes Fresh Fragility
title_cn: 比特币撤退的零售大军暴露出新的脆弱性
summary: Bitcoin spent years trying to shed its reputation as a playground for speculative retail traders. Its latest selloff is exposing the tradeoff: Wall Street brought scale and legitimacy, but the retail buyers who once helped absorb sharp declines have largely vanished.

title: Hedge Fund Targets $500 Million for Trading El Niño Crop Risks
title_cn: 对冲基金目标 5 亿美元用于厄尔尼诺作物风险交易
summary: The growing threat posed by a so-called “super El Niño” to global food supplies is spurring the creation of a new commodities fund.

title: Investor Who Scored 900% Win in 2008 Crisis Has New Big Short Bet
title_cn: 在 2008 年危机中获得 900% 胜利的投资者又进行了新的大空头押注
summary: Hedge fund manager Lee Robinson notched a 900% gain during the global financial crisis by turning a $20 million position into $200 million with timely bets against the US subprime mortgage sector.

title: Hollow Brook's Richter Eyes Opportunities Beyond AI Hype
title_cn: Hollow Brook 的 Richter 看到人工智能炒作之外的机遇
summary: The global race to finance the AI boom is on, with companies from SpaceX to SK Hynix seeking fresh capital to fuel growth. But beyond the headlines and geopolitical noise, where are the real long-term opportunities? Philip Richter, President and Co-Chief Investment Officer at Hollow Brook Wealth Management, joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" to discuss where he's finding value in today's market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Blackstone’s $343 Million Loan on Chicago Skyscraper Defaults
title_cn: Blackstone 针对芝加哥摩天大楼违约提供 3.43 亿美元贷款
summary: A Blackstone Inc. loan on an office tower in the heart of Chicago’s financial center has gone into default, the latest sign of the persistent challenges landlords face after the city’s commercial real estate values tumbled in the wake of the pandemic.

title: A Return to $3 Gasoline? Here’s What It Will Take
title_cn: 汽油价格回归 3 美元？这就是需要做的事情
summary: US President Donald Trump is calling for gasoline prices to fall faster, but US drivers will probably still have to wait a while for significantly cheaper costs at the pump.

title: Hertz Tumbles on Financing Plan That Offers Shares for Shorting
title_cn: 赫兹因提供卖空股票的融资计划而大跌眼镜
summary: Hertz Global Holdings Inc. is taking an unusual approach to issuing debt: concurrently serving up shares that are designed to be shorted.

title: Sony Pictures Invests $100 Million in Giant Screen Startup Cosm
title_cn: 索尼影业向巨幕初创公司 Cosm 投资 1 亿美元
summary: Sony Pictures Entertainment is investing $100 million in Cosm, an operator of large-screen theaters that show films and sporting events.

title: OpenAI Unveils First Custom AI Chip With Broadcom | Bloomberg Tech 6/24/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 合作推出首款定制 AI 芯片 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 24 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow takes a look at OpenAI's first custom AI chip, called Jalapeno, developed in partnership with Broadcom. Plus, SK Hynix is planning to raise $29 billion in a landmark US listing. And, Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman weighs in on the company's first quarterly earnings since going public. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Markets Weigh Next Phase of AI Trade | Open Interest 6/24/2026
title_cn: 市场权衡人工智能贸易的下一阶段|未平仓合约 2026 年 6 月 24 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." The AI trade faces its next big test as Micron takes the earnings spotlight. Meanwhile, South Korea's SK Hynix pursues a landmark US listing to help fund its AI ambitions. BlackRock's Gargi Chaudhuri, Simplify's Paisley Nardini and Hollow Brook's Philip Richter discuss where investors can find opportunity and what risks they're watching. Plus, MNTN CEO Mark Douglas discusses how AI and live sports are fueling a global advertising boom around the World Cup. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Andreessen's George Says SpaceX Has Path to AI in Space
title_cn: Andreessen 的 George 表示 SpaceX 有通往太空人工智能的道路
summary: David George, a general partner at Andreessen Horowitz LLC and early SpaceX investor, says Elon Musk's newly public company has the capability to pull off the big bet on artificial-intelligence computing capacity in space. He speaks with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why AI Makes Memory Demand Less Cyclical
title_cn: 为什么人工智能降低了内存需求的周期性
summary: Celine Woo, portfolio manager and analyst at Lazard Asset Management, explains why the firm sees opportunities not on the largest AI capex spenders, but on where that capital flows, the hardware supply chain companies enabling AI infrastructure. She joins Ed Ludlow to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cerebras CEO Says Capacity Is Largest Constraint Right Now
title_cn: Cerebras 首席执行官表示，容量是目前最大的限制
summary: Cerebras shares plunged after the company gave an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors who were expecting the company to carve out a bigger slice of the AI data center market. Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman joins Ed Ludlow to discuss the results and what's next for the company on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What to Watch for in Micron Earnings
title_cn: 美光收益值得关注的事项
summary: Micron, which will publish earnings after the bell, has become one of the most important stocks in the world. Shares are up nearly 300% this year. Investors want to see what the memory-chip maker tells them about the AI rally. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow breaks down what to look out for. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Is Modeling Mega Storms With Surprising Accuracy
title_cn: 人工智能正在以惊人的精度模拟特大风暴
summary:
AI hurricane forecasts faced a first stress test in 2025: Hurricane Melissa, the strongest Category 5 hurricane in the modern era. AI models are trained on historical data, meaning a storm of this magnitude was not in the training set and potentially not predictable. The AI forecast captured Melissa’s rapid intensification roughly on par with NOAA’s official guidance, suggesting AI weather models may generalize to the extreme events that matter most for energy, infrastructure and insurance risk.

For more, we speak with Ryan Ward, BloombergNEF Weather Associate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MNTN CEO on World Cup Ad Boom
title_cn: MNTN 首席执行官谈世界杯广告热潮
summary: The World Cup is expected to drive more than $10.5 billion in advertising spending worldwide. As AI floods the internet with content, live sports are becoming even more valuable to brands. MNTN CEO Mark Douglas joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" from the Cannes Lions conference to discuss what's driving ad spending. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Estados Unidos, China y Europa aceleran la carrera por el liderazgo cuántico
title_cn: 美国、中国和欧洲加速量子领导地位之争
summary: Ya llegó la computación cuántica. Pero, ¿qué es?

title: A Solution to Climbing Electricity Bills
title_cn: 电费上涨的解决方案
summary: This startup thinks it has the perfect location for a data center: your house. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Liam Denning explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Tech San Francisco 2026 Highlights
title_cn: 彭博科技旧金山 2026 年亮点
summary: Led by Bloomberg's Emily Chang and Tom Giles, Bloomberg Tech 2026 brought together the leading CEOs, investors, and innovators who are harnessing technology to change the world around us. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Earnings Take on New Gravity With Market on Edge Over AI
title_cn: 随着市场对人工智能的关注，美光的盈利呈现出新的吸引力
summary:
Tuesday’s stock-market slide was what one Wall Street strategist called a “chip-wreck.”
The semiconductor companies that have led this year’s stock-market advance with triple-digit percentage gains were suddenly hit with a wave of doubts about the sustainability of the AI-driven rally.
Daniel Ives, Global Head of Technology as Wedbush Securities, discusses the broader tech landscape as investors remain jittery on high-flying tech stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI, Broadcom Develop AI Chip Called 'Jalapeno'
title_cn: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 开发名为“Jalapeno”的 AI 芯片
summary: OpenAI and Broadcom Inc. have developed a custom artificial intelligence chip called Jalapeno. OpenAI is now testing the samples. The companies say this chip can cut costs by 50%. Ed Ludlow reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk’s SpaceX Adds Billions in Debt While Cutting Interest
title_cn: 马斯克的 SpaceX 在削减利息的同时增加了数十亿美元的债务
summary: Elon Musk is no stranger to financial alchemy. His latest feat: adding billions of dollars of debt onto his cash-burning business empire while simultaneously cutting its annual interest burden.

title: Qualcomm to Buy Modular for $3.9 Billion to Help AI Push
title_cn: 高通斥资 39 亿美元收购 Modular 助力 AI 推动
summary: Qualcomm Inc. said it is acquiring Modular Inc., for about $3.9 billion in stock, adding artificial intelligence software capabilities that will aid its push into data centers.

title: OpenAI, Broadcom Unveil Chip to Run Models Faster, Cheaper
title_cn: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出芯片以更快、更便宜地运行模型
summary: OpenAI unveiled its first custom artificial intelligence chip developed in partnership with Broadcom Inc., part of a bid by the ChatGPT maker to gain an edge by tailoring hardware to better run its AI products.

title: Google’s New $100 Speaker Makes a Weak Case for Gemini in the Home
title_cn: 谷歌新推出的 100 美元扬声器让 Gemini 在家庭中的表现不佳
summary: The Google Home Speaker is the first new device of its kind to come from Alphabet Inc. in six years. In that time, Google has reshaped itself as an industry leader in artificial intelligence, with its Gemini platform now ubiquitous across consumer hardware like smartphones and web services like Search, Workspace and YouTube.

title: Amazon Seller Reveals Rare Glimpse of Shadow Bribery Market
title_cn: 亚马逊卖家罕见地一睹影子贿赂市场的风采
summary: Middlemen lurking on message apps like WeChat offer access to company employees they say can grant favors for a price.

title: Microsoft Says Copilot AI Helped Knock Down Cybercrime Tools
title_cn: 微软表示 Copilot AI 帮助摧毁了网络犯罪工具
summary: Investigators used new tools to defeat old malware technology.

title: Biotech Visionary Is Skeptical About AI’s Impact on Medical Innovation
title_cn: 生物技术远见者对人工智能对医疗创新的影响持怀疑态度
summary: The inventor of the groundbreaking Crispr gene-editing technology is skeptical about artificial intelligence replacing human effort in the realm of scientific discovery, adding to a growing debate over its impact on medical research and innovation.

title: Cerebras Plunges After Issuing Disappointing 2026 Sales Outlook
title_cn: Cerebras 发布令人失望的 2026 年销售前景后暴跌
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares plunged in early trading after the newly public chipmaker gave an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors who were expecting the company to carve out a bigger slice of the AI data center market.

title: Netflix Unveils New Horror Game to Jumpstart Interactive Offerings
title_cn: Netflix 推出新恐怖游戏以推动互动产品的发展
summary: The company wants ‘Unhinged’ to be a gateway to other video games on the streaming service

title: Micron Earnings to Be ‘Gut Check Moment’ for Markets, Dan Ives Says
title_cn: 丹·艾夫斯表示，美光的盈利将成为市场的“直觉检查时刻”
summary: Dan Ives, global head of tech research and senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, discusses the importance of Wednesday’s earnings from Micron Technologies, tech spending on capex and the AI buildout, and how he views public-private partnerships on AI companies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Envoy to Italy Praises Meloni, Downplays Spat With Trump
title_cn: 美国驻意大利特使赞扬梅洛尼，淡化与特朗普的争执
summary: The US ambassador to Italy moved to further ease tensions between the two allies, saying relations are “fine” in the aftermath of a public clash between Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Donald Trump.

title: Trump, GOP Clash After President Scraps Housing Bill Signing
title_cn: 总统废除住房法案签署后，特朗普与共和党发生冲突
summary: Donald Trump and Republicans in the US Senate squabbled on Wednesday, as the president abruptly canceled plans to sign a bipartisan housing bill and lawmakers pressed him over his handling of the war in Iran.

title: Head of South Africa’s No. 2 Party Speaks Out Against Xenophobia
title_cn: 南非第二大党党魁公开反对仇外心理
summary: The leader of the second-biggest party in South Africa’s governing coalition has taken a strong stand against xenophobic violence and called on the authorities to protect immigrants who are being targeted by protesters.

title: European Leaders Vow to Take On More of NATO Burden
title_cn: 欧洲领导人誓言承担更多北约负担
summary: European leaders insisted they’re doing what US President Donald Trump wants: making NATO “more European.”

title: 'New Yorkers Are Hungry for a New Kind of Politics,' Says NYC Mayor Mamdani
title_cn: 纽约市市长马姆达尼表示，“纽约人渴望一种新型政治”
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani spoke with reporters at a news conference in the Bronx on Wednesday about the Democratic congressional primaries. Three candidates Mamdani endorsed won their races, showing that his coalition is gaining strength. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RFK Jr.'s HHS to Divert Funds From Teen Pregnancy Grant Program
title_cn: 小罗伯特·肯尼迪 (RFK Jr.) 的卫生和公众服务部 (HHS) 将转移青少年怀孕补助计划的资金
summary: The Department of Health and Human Services is canceling millions of dollars in teen pregnancy prevention grants as it restructures priorities for the reproductive health program.

title: Trump Cancels Event to Sign Housing Bill
title_cn: 特朗普取消签署住房法案的活动
summary: President Donald Trump canceled plans to sign a bipartisan bill on Wednesday afternoon aimed at lowering housing costs and increasing supply, until Congress approves voting restrictions. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports from the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Team Looks at Treasury Breakup, Bank of England Reforms
title_cn: 伯纳姆团队着眼于财政部拆分和英格兰银行改革
summary: Influential figures in Andy Burnham’s entourage have urged the would-be Prime Minister to break up the Treasury to refocus the government’s agenda on growth.

title: Mamdani’s Picks Sweep New York City Primary Races
title_cn: 马姆达尼的选秀横扫纽约市初选
summary: Three candidates endorsed by Zohran Mamdani swept to victory in Democratic congressional primaries on Tuesday, showing that the coalition which powered the New York City mayor to a surprising victory last year is gaining strength. But can it last? Tyler Kendall explains (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lula and Sheinbaum Forge Closer Ties as Latin America Realigns
title_cn: 随着拉丁美洲的重新调整，卢拉和辛鲍姆建立了更紧密的关系
summary: Claudia Sheinbaum rarely speaks highly of other heads of state, but when it comes to Brazil’s Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, she doesn’t hold back.

title: Adams Aide Charged, Ex-NYPD Officials Searched in FBI Probe
title_cn: 亚当斯助手被指控，前纽约警察局官员在联邦调查局调查中接受搜查
summary: Federal prosecutors in Brooklyn have charged Frank Carone, the former chief of staff to Mayor Eric Adams, his brother and two others in connection with an alleged bribery scheme as a long-running corruption scandal rumbles on months after Adams left office.

title: Will Andy Burnham as Prime Minister Spook Bond Markets?
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆（Andy Burnham）担任首相会惊动债券市场吗？
summary:
Andy Burnham appears set to succeed Keir Starmer as prime minister — what could it mean for the UK economy?

Chloe Chaplain explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rheinmetall Defense Ambitions Stung by German Warship Switch
title_cn: 莱茵金属防务公司的野心被德国战舰转换所刺痛
summary: In the four years since the Ukraine war started, German military contractor Rheinmetall AG went from defense also-ran with a narrow focus on munitions to a one-stop shop dabbling in land, sea and even space warfare, and its skyrocketing stock price mirrored those aspirations.

title: Mamdani’s Picks Sweep NYC Races as Anti-Establishment Anger Grows
title_cn: 随着反建制愤怒的加剧，马姆达尼的选择横扫纽约市比赛
summary: Three candidates endorsed by Zohran Mamdani swept to victory in Democratic congressional primaries on Tuesday, showing that the coalition which powered the New York City mayor to a surprising victory last year is gaining strength.

title: Here Are the Key Issues Dividing Trump and Senate Republicans
title_cn: 以下是特朗普和参议院共和党人之间存在分歧的关键问题
summary: Top Senate Republicans have a message for President Donald Trump: This is not working.

title: Leftist Candidate Concedes Defeat in Colombian Election
title_cn: 左翼候选人承认在哥伦比亚选举中失败
summary: Leftist Senator Iván Cepeda conceded defeat in Colombia’s presidential runoff, dispelling lingering doubts over the results after preliminary counts showed his rival had won by less than one percentage point.

title: Carlyle's Thomas Says It's Hard to Be Bearish Amid Capex Boom
title_cn: 凯雷的托马斯表示，在资本支出繁荣的情况下很难看空
summary: Jason Thomas, head of global research and investment strategy at Carlyle, discusses how US policies and the AI buildout are shaping markets. He notes nominal GDP growth is driven too heavily by inflation, and that the Federal Reserve’s stance has shifted so much that simply holding rates steady now qualifies as dovish. Thomas speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani Candidates Lead June 23 Primary Fights
title_cn: Mamdani 候选人在 6 月 23 日的初选中领先
summary:
New York City’s Democratic delegation to Congress will have a more progressive tilt after stunning primary wins Tuesday by three leftists backed by Mayor Zohran Mamdani, including two who ousted House Democrats.
Libby Cantrill, Managing Director: Public Policy at PIMCO, discusses her takeaways from recent primaries across the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carney Moves to Fast-Track Northern Port, Highway Projects
title_cn: 卡尼转向快速通道北部港口、高速公路项目
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government is preparing to fast-track a set of northern infrastructure projects, marking the first time it invokes new powers to speed up the regulatory process.

title: Rubio Meets Gulf Leaders After Rocky Start to US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 美伊会谈开局不利后卢比奥会见海湾领导人
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met the leaders of the United Arab Emirates and Kuwait on Wednesday, as he looks to reassure Persian Gulf allies of the strength of an interim peace agreement with Iran.

title: NY Pension Head DiNapoli Wins First Primary Challenge in Decades
title_cn: 纽约养老金负责人迪纳波利赢得数十年来的首次初选挑战
summary: New York Comptroller Thomas DiNapoli secured an easy victory in his first primary challenge since 2007, according to a projection by Decision Desk HQ.

title: Swiss Open Talks on Air Defense System to Diversify From Patriot
title_cn: 瑞士公开讨论防空系统从爱国者转向多元化
summary: Switzerland is opening contract talks for a new long-range air defense system, while scaling back a planned sales-tax increase intended to help fund its military buildup.

title: Iran and Oman to Coordinate Evacuations Through Hormuz, IMO Says
title_cn: 国际海事组织表示，伊朗和阿曼将协调通过霍尔木兹海峡的疏散行动
summary: Shippers can transit the Strait of Hormuz via Iranian or Omani-and US-coordinated waters, according to the International Maritime Organization, part of a broader plan to evacuate stranded vessels.

title: Netherlands Lobbies US to Drop Chip Curbs Targeting ASML
title_cn: 荷兰游说美国放弃针对 ASML 的芯片限制
summary: The Netherlands is lobbying the US to not expand export controls on semiconductor equipment, a move that would constrain ASML Holding NV’s ability to sell to China.

title: Bessent Says Warsh Came Out Talking ‘Tough’ on Inflation
title_cn: 贝森特称沃什在通胀问题上发表了“强硬”言论
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent signaled confidence in newly installed Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh and indicated President Donald Trump has given him space to make his own decisions.

title: China Auditor Says Top Banks Evaded Tax, Made Improper Loans
title_cn: 中国审计员称顶级银行逃税、发放不当贷款
summary: China’s top auditor reported to the legislature about government spending and issues uncovered at some of the nation’s top financial institutions — an account that is provided to lawmakers annually.

title: Merz Says German Pension Package to Be Approved by Year-End
title_cn: 默茨称德国养老金计划将于年底前获得批准
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz said his government will aim to push a comprehensive pension overhaul through parliament by the end of the year.

title: Ramaphosa Taps Former Treasury Budget Chief as Economic Adviser
title_cn: 拉马福萨任命前财政部预算主管为经济顾问
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa appointed former National Treasury budget chief Michael Sachs as his economic adviser, bringing a respected fiscal policy technocrat back into the government as the country seeks to accelerate growth and deepen economic reforms.
